FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.40sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f656bd58ca0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907306431 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907312562 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907345594 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907346445 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907364459 {

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907376972 new <- list()

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907390407 new$width <- width
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907391289 if (!missing(height))

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907451511 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907464745 new$version <- version
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907465497 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907484361 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907486835 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907509187 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907510049 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907525247 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907526098 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907539533 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907540335 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907555142 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907556024 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907572264 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907586070 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907614042 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907615194 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907630763 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907631615 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907645261 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907655740 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907656521 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907673522 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907674264 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907689663 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907690514 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907714499 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907715751 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907732533 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907735809 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907773940 "default"))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907775273 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907790271 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907791112 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907803355 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907804196 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907826478 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907827480 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907842408 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907855061 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907855823 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907871231 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907871973 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907886199 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907887051 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907902349 domain = NA)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907903120 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907917698 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907918669 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907933627 old$family <- family
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907934459 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907947523 version <- old$version

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907983580 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907984562 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908002365 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908003207 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908021260 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908022082 domain = NA)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908035236 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908035938 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908050946 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908051637 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908068077 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908068839 invisible()

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907306431 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907312562 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907345594 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907346445 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907364459 {

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907376972 new <- list()

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907390407 new$width <- width
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907391289 if (!missing(height))

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907420964 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907448976 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907451511 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907464745 new$version <- version
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907465497 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907484361 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907486835 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907509187 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907510049 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907525247 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907526098 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907539533 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907540335 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907555142 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907556024 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907572264 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907586070 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907614042 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907615194 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907630763 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907631615 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907645261 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907655740 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907656521 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907673522 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907674264 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907689663 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907690514 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907714499 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907715751 enc <- family$encoding
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907732533 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907735809 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907773940 "default"))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907775273 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907790271 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907791112 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907803355 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907804196 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907826478 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907827480 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907842408 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907855061 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907855823 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907871231 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907871973 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907886199 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907887051 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907902349 domain = NA)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907903120 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907917698 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907918669 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907933627 old$family <- family
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907934459 }
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907947523 version <- old$version

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907968993 "2.0")

2026/07/07 05:16:44.907983580 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/07/07 05:16:44.907984562 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908002365 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908003207 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908021260 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908022082 domain = NA)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908035236 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908035938 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908050946 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908051637 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908068077 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/07/07 05:16:44.908068839 invisible()
